templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to know more about our program is by filling out our application form here: https://larroude.com/pages/ambassador-program Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://larroude.com/pages/return-police

templates.name: What is Route? (Route Package Protection)
templates.content: Route is an insurance and tracking app that keeps tabs on your deliveries every step of the way. It guarantees protection against loss, theft or damage.

templates.name: How long will it take to receive my refund?
templates.content: A refund will be issued within 5-7 business days from the date your return is received. You will receive an email confirmation once the return has been processed. Please note it may take a few additional business days to see the credit post depending on your bank or financial institution.

templates.name: Where are my items shipped from?
templates.content: Our orders ship out from New York. Let us know if you have any more questions; we're here to help!

templates.name: Can I include a gift message with my order?
templates.content: Yes, absolutely! During the checkout process, you will have the option to enter a personalized gift message. This message will be included on the packing slip that accompanies your order.

templates.name: Is the $20 discount from the first purchase valid for all items?
templates.content: Yes, the $20 discount applies to all Larroudé items, but I'm afraid it does not extend to Colléct items.

templates.name: Can I return or exchange an item that has been customized?
templates.content: Unfortunatly, you cannot return or exchange an item that has been custom made for you. Customized items are final sale.

templates.name: What do I do If I miss the delivery of my package?
templates.content: We know how that happens sometimes. Please contact UPS directly with your tracking order for assistance. You can also contact our Client Services team for help at help@larroude.com or 1-833-576-9929. Our team would be happy to assist!

templates.name: What payment options do you accept?
templates.content: We've got you covered with a variety of payment options! You can choose from American Express, Visa, Mastercard, Amazon Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Meta Pay, Shop Pay, and even Venmo. We want to make checkout as easy and convenient as possible for you!

templates.name: When will I be charged for my order?
templates.content: As soon as we receive and confirm your order, we'll begin processing it, and you'll be charged at that time. You'll also receive a confirmation email from us right after, so you'll know everything is underway!

templates.name: Shipping International
templates.content: We are pleased to offer free shipping for international orders. However, please note that duties and taxes will be applied to your purchase to ensure your order won't be held up in customs. This way, we can guarantee a smooth delivery process.

templates.name: What if I forgot the password to my Larroudé account?
templates.content: Simply click on the "Forgot Password" link on the "Sign In" page and follow the instructions to reset your password. You can always contact our Client Services team at help@larroude.com for assistance.

templates.name: How do I use a promo code?
templates.content: Simply enter your promo code in the "Promo Code" field at checkout, and it will be applied to your order!

templates.name: Can I return or exchange an item bought on sale?
templates.content: Yes, you can! However, all items bought on sale are eligible for returns or exchanges for in store credit only.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/larroude/ and FB here: https://web.facebook.com/larroude.store

templates.name: Are international orders final sales?
templates.content: For orders shipped outside the Continental U.S., all sales are final. To help ensure you're happy with your purchase, please take a moment to review our size chart and double-check all details before placing your order.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: Once your order has shipped, you'll receive a confirmation email with tracking information so you can easily follow your package every step of the way!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We're committed to processing orders as soon as they are received. Because of this, I'm afraid we are unable to honor any changes once the order has been placed.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a retailer near you here: https://larroude.com/pages/stockists?srsltid=AfmBOoqZcbHx0x77P_RAV9aqNiNx_xyOtRXjMhmBqgebOyA7XG_v1OCO

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at +1-833-576-9929 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 business day and we usually ship via UPS. Once shipped it will take 5-7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to apply for wholesale is through this link: https://larroude.com/pages/become-a-wholesaler Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@larroude.com. Our team is available between 08:00 am - 5:00 pm (ET) Monday - Friday. Emails received outside of business hours will be answered by the next business day.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! Would you mind sharing your usual size? Our shoes generally run true to size and all sizes are based on a medium width. We recommend you order your normal U.S. shoe size. Please also refer to our "Size and Fit" section on each product page for specific dimensions and information by style.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer complimentary standard shipping on all Larroude orders!

templates.name: Do I have to get Route?
templates.content: Route is completely optional, though it is automatically added to the cart for your protection, you are able to switch it off if you do not wish to protect your package.

templates.name: Can I ship to a P.O. Box?
templates.content: Unfortunately we are unable to ship orders to P.O. Boxes at this time.

templates.name: How do I use Route service?
templates.content: If anything happens to your package-whether it's a manufacturing issue or it gets lost in transit-and you purchased protection at checkout, don't worry! Just head over to https://claims.route.com/ to file a claim. The team is quick to respond and will assist you with either a refund or a replacement. We've got you covered!

templates.name: Collect: How it works
templates.content: Colléct offers a handpicked selection of finely curated products. It's important to note that we do not maintain physical inventory. Instead, the entire delivery process is managed by each respective brand.

templates.name: Do you gift wrap?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't offer gift wrapping. Items come in a dust bag, inside our signature Larroude box. Our boxes are 100% recycled yet beautifully designed.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://larroude.happyreturns.com/

templates.name: Is there a fee to process returns or exchanges?
templates.content: We're happy to offer free returns and exchanges on all eligible items within the Continental U.S., using a pre-paid UPS label for your convenience!

templates.name: When will I receive my order confirmation?
templates.content: An order confirmation is sent to the email address provided when placing an order. If it takes longer than a few minutes to receive your confirmation, please check your spam folder. If you still cannot find your order confirmation please email us at help@larroude.com.

templates.name: How long will it take to receive my exchange?
templates.content: Once your package is returned, we will process your exchange and ship out the new product within 2 business days via UPS Ground.

templates.name: How do I care for my shoes?
templates.content: To keep your Larroudé shoes looking as beautiful as the day you got them, we recommend following our custom care guide here: https://larroude.com/pages/larroude-care-guide With the right attention, your shoes will maintain their elegance and craftsmanship for years to come.
